en: Kerry, what happens when you drop or shake a can of soda?
Right. I'm sorry, I, I'm, uh...
Here. Let me show you a little trick.
Something about the centrifugal force pulls the bubbles from the inside of the can and stops it from exploding.
Don't want our clients to get a surprise, now do we?
All right. You know who taught me that trick?
He used to do it. Had a habit.
Anytime he opened a can, almost unconsciously, I asked him about it once.
Just his way of being prepared for anything, accidental or otherwise.
